issue.title: clang is suboptimal for `log(pow(x, y))` with fast-math
issue.author: k-arrows

comments.author: tanmaysachan
comments.body: @EugeneZelenko Could I be assigned this issue? I'm adding a function to `InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp` (since that's where other opts relating to pow and exp live) and adding a test for it.
